title: poetry bootstrap vars
description: poetry bootstrap variables. OS Compatibility: All. Python dependency management.

POETRY_HOME.description: Directory where Poetry will be installed. Defaults to ~/.local or %APPDATA%\pypoetry.

POETRY_VERSION.description: Specific version of Poetry to install.

LOGS_DIR.description: Directory where logs should be stored.

SERVE_FROM.description: Base directory or context path from which the service should be served.

LIBSCRIPT_VERSION.description: Specifies the version of the package to use.
